title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch

jsonLd.title: Curriculum Developer Vacancy at Osmania University - 2026 Batch
jsonLd.description:
An exciting career opportunity awaits you at Osmania University. We are on the lookout for a dedicated Curriculum Developer to strengthen our Jabalpur-based team.

About Osmania University:
Osmania University is a leading organization in the Remote sector, committed to excellence, innovation, and employee growth. We offer a dynamic work environment where talent is recognized and rewarded.

Key Responsibilities:
• Participate in teacher training and professional development programs
• Collaborate with faculty on curriculum development initiatives
• Develop and deliver engaging lesson plans for students
• Monitor student progress and provide timely feedback
• Conduct parent-teacher meetings and update parents on student performance
• Coordinate with academic counselors for student career guidance
• Design formative and summative assessments aligned to learning objectives

Required Skills & Qualifications:
• CA / CMA / CFA certification
• 1-3 years of relevant experience
• Proficiency in E-learning
• Proficiency in IB Curriculum
• Proficiency in Special Education
• Proficiency in Zoom/Teams
• Proficiency in Mentoring
• Proficiency in MS Office
• Proficiency in Data Analysis
• Proficiency in Content Creation

Work Mode: Remote - Work from anywhere in India

What We Offer:
• Employee stock options (ESOPs) for eligible roles
• Recognition and rewards programs
• Flexible working hours
• Referral bonus program
• Maternity and paternity leave
• Modern office with recreational facilities
• Salary Range: 4 LPA - 9 LPA per annum

Location: Jabalpur, Madhya Pradesh, India

If you are excited about this opportunity, apply now and take the next step in your career journey with Osmania University!
